user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the rear of the claimed car with significant damage to the bumper area, allowing for assessment.
claim_status_justification: The claim of a dent on the rear bumper is supported by image img_1, which clearly shows severe denting and deformation in the rear bumper area of the silver car.

user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Both images clearly show the front bumper of a car, allowing for assessment of damage.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows severe denting and a broken headlight on the front bumper, which is a much higher severity and different type of damage than the claimed 'scratch'. Image img_2 shows a different car (Jaguar) with no visible damage on the front bumper, contradicting the claim of damage on 'my car'.

user_claim: Customer: I am opening a claim for my windshield. | Support: What happened? | Customer: A small stone hit it while I was driving and now there is a crack spreading from that spot. | Support: Is the car otherwise okay? | Customer: Yes, this is only about the front glass. I added the pictures I have.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Image img_1 clearly shows extensive cracking on the car's windshield, which is the claimed part and damage.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows a car windshield with extensive cracking, directly supporting the claim of a crack on the windshield. Image img_2 shows the same car but does not clearly show the damaged area.
